user.title: Uninus Calendar Service Scheduler
user.description: Create calendar events that run Home Assistant services when they start.

data.allowed_services: Allowed services, one per line. Supports domain.* wildcards.
Allowed services, one per line. Supports domain.* wildcards.

clear_traceability_data.title: Confirm clearing traceability data
clear_traceability_data.description: This permanently deletes farms, plots, crop cycles, agricultural operations, and evidence stored by this integration. It also deletes Calendar events marked as traceability operations. Ordinary Calendar events and data from other integrations are not deleted.

data.confirm_clear_traceability_data: I understand this cannot be undone; clear all traceability data

error.confirmation_required: Select the confirmation checkbox to continue.
error.clear_failed: Could not clear traceability data. The reset was not completed; check Home Assistant logs and retry.
